event: Legal has flagged that using under-18 browsing history for personalization violates PDPA §13. The weekend_browse_fraction feature, when joined with age_band=18-24, effectively infers under-18 behaviour. Re-classify: is this a hard constraint?
expected_trust_plane_response: Hard constraint (law). Drop weekend_browse_fraction for under-21 age bands OR drop age_band as a feature. Document in journal.
